notes: parseAstroTemplate is 115 LOC with CC59 and nesting 11 inside a 207-line pure regex parser
CodeSift audit reports CQ11 complexity and CQ13 private-symbol warnings; CQ8, CQ14, and CQ17 pass
Focused baseline: 25 parser tests passed before production edits

plan.summary: Keep parseAstroTemplate and all public result types available from the existing module; move preprocessing/guards, resolution helpers, mutable tag state, and tag scanning into focused private modules.

extractions.unit: BOM/CRLF normalization, frontmatter split, size/brace guards, comment masking
line/column, expression context, framework and import resolution, slot fallback lookup
tag/section stacks and accumulated parser result state
tag regex walk and per-tag state transitions

plan.dependency_impact: astro extractor and astro-islands consume parseAstroTemplate and its type exports through the existing module path; no external consumer should import private split modules.
plan.existing_reuse: Reuse the existing regex semantics and pure parser helpers; no new parser dependency or AST behavior.
plan.test_strategy: Run the existing 25-case parser suite unchanged against the pre-refactor code, then rerun it after each extraction and verify downstream Astro extractor/island suites.

prove.findings_disposition: fixed: quoted tag values, specific framework extensions, comparison text, expression directives, directive boundaries, and void parents; preserved: frontmatter/brace-depth/slot and malformed-expression semantics

cq_after.score: 4/5 machine checks pass; CQ11 improved from CC59 to max CC17
notes: Scoped CQ8, CQ14, and CQ17 pass; CQ11 is materially reduced but CodeSift still warns on scanner CC17; CQ13 reports private-module false positives
Independent CQ auditor PASS: no critical or FIX-NOW findings; public exports and scoped import graph preserved
Adversarial review found repeated warnings across passes; seven mechanical parser issues were fixed with regression tests, four legacy semantics remain documented

verification.runtime_exports: PASS: parseAstroTemplate and five public types preserved
verification.degraded_tools: CodeSift hidden clone/dead/cycle tools unavailable; machine audit plus independent CQ auditor and adversarial provider used

parseAstroTemplate CC59/nesting 11; public callers identified; no hotspot
